ddls:
CREATE TABLE "union_territories" (
  "ut_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each union territory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the union territory */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-2:IN code for the union territory */,
  "vehicle_code" TEXT /* Vehicle code for the union territory */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone the union territory belongs to */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital city */,
  "largest_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the largest city */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the union territory was established */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the union territory */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the union territory in km^2 */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the union territory in square miles */,
  "area_hectares" REAL /* Area of the union territory in hectares */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the union territory */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the union territory */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the union territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ut_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_union_territories_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., en for English) */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Language family or category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ut_languages" (
  "ut_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each union territory-language combination */,
  "ut_id" INTEGER /* ID of the union territory */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "is_additional" INTEGER /* Whether the language is additional or primary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ut_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ut_languages_ut_id FOREIGN KEY ("ut_id") REFERENCES union_territories ("ut_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ut_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of zone (e.g., administrative, geographical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "ut_id" INTEGER /* ID of the union territory the city belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the city in km^2 */,
  "is_capital" INTEGER /* Whether the city is a capital */,
  "is_largest" INTEGER /* Whether the city is the largest in its union territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_ut_id FOREIGN KEY ("ut_id") REFERENCES union_territories ("ut_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, public) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territorial_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territorial change */,
  "ut_id" INTEGER /* ID of the union territory affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., merger, split) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territorial_changes_ut_id FOREIGN KEY ("ut_id") REFERENCES union_territories ("ut_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
